data.comment: bullet has per-variant tunings; spawn picks via mesh.tuning_ref. Movement = position.velocity (the position handler integrates). ttl despawns. As of iter 726 the `kinetic-hit` facet lands: detects any Thing of `target_kind` within `radius`, builds a {to,message} damage envelope (lift-ready per docs/ACTOR_TRAJECTORY.md), applies hp damage, despawns. Hero bullets target_kind=enemy; enemy bullets target_kind=hero.
